since_last: 33% of 101 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +0.77%; AI bubble risk 50 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 33% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -1.32% · BTC -2.04% · Gold -2.31% · Nasdaq100 -1.98%. 33% of 101 AI names are green — broad selling. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +0.77%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +0.77%; weakest is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at -3.10%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: TSLA is the standout at -14.23%
cards.body: Leaders: CBRS +5.82%, SMCI +5.01%, HON +4.99%, SKHY +4.77%, GEV +4.28%. Laggards: TSLA -14.23%, CRNC -8.63%, GOOGL -6.59%, SYM -4.57%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.10% at $115.14
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.10% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
